questions: how to become a web designer
web design vs web development difference
answers: Web design is the process of planning and creating the visual layout, structure, and user experience of websites. It involves HTML, CSS, design tools, and understanding user behavior.

To become a web designer, learn HTML/CSS basics, study design principles, master tools like Figma or Webflow, build a portfolio, and keep up with modern design trends.

Web design combines aesthetics with functionality. Current trends include dark mode, micro-animations, minimalist layouts, and AI-powered personalization. A great website is both beautiful and easy to navigate.
